detail.description: Luis Lara grounds out, second baseman José Fermín to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Luis Lara singles on a line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd.
Luis Lara grounds out, third baseman Blaze Jordan to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Luis Lara flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Luis Lara singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Gary Sánchez scores. Cooper Pratt scores. Joey Ortiz to 3rd. Luis Lara to 2nd.
Luis Lara lines out to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Luis Lara grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Luis Lara singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Luis Lara flies out to center fielder Jake Mangum.
Luis Lara grounds out, first baseman Ryan O'Hearn to pitcher Yohan Ramírez.
Luis Lara doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum.
Luis Lara lines out to second baseman Brandon Lowe.
Luis Lara singles on a line drive to right fielder Javier Sanoja.
Luis Lara grounds out, third baseman Javier Sanoja to first baseman Kyle Stowers.
